retrieval.reason: Fastest local general model with the largest installed context window.

summarization.reason: Balanced general summarization without tying up the coding model.

generation.reason: 7B fits entirely in the 4070 Laptop 8GB VRAM, keeping auto-continue turns responsive. 14B is fallback for batch work.

batch_generation.reason: Reserved for long single-shot targeted tasks where quality justifies CPU offload latency.

design_continuation.reason: Better fit for doctrinal and design continuation than the coding-tuned model.

openclaw.notes: Kept as-is. The platform may call its local endpoint later, but does not depend on it for startup.
